news.t: Global X Announces Launch of Disruptive Materials ETF (DMAT)

holdings.infoBox: EART is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Anglo American stock at 4.97%, Freeport-McMoRan at 4.72%, Antofagasta at 4.66%, Rio Tinto Group at 4.47%, and PLS Group at 4.46%.

overview.description: The Global X Rare Earth & Critical Materials ETF (EART) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund is passively managed to track a market cap-weighted index of global stocks that produce metals and other materials associated with disruptive technologies. EART was launched on Jan 24, 2022 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X Announces Launch of Disruptive Materials ETF (DMAT)
data.text: New York, Jan. 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global X ETFs, the New York-based provider of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), today announced the launch of the Global X Disruptive Materials ETF (DMAT). DMAT...
